description: Transform inanctekstil.store from empty WooCommerce install into a fully functional, legally compliant custom curtain e-commerce store matching TAC-level UX quality. Server: Hetzner Docker (Traefik + WordPress + MariaDB + Redis). SSH: ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158. WP-CLI prefix: docker exec wordpress wp ... --allow-root. Brand: Navy #1B2A4A on White #FFFFFF, Playfair Display + Inter fonts. Curtain calculator plugin v2.0.0 already deployed.

userStories.title: WordPress Base Configuration
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want WordPress configured for Turkish language, correct timezone, and SEO-friendly URLs so that the site feels native to Turkish customers.
acceptanceCriteria: WordPress language set to tr_TR via: docker exec wordpress wp language core install tr_TR --allow-root && docker exec wordpress wp site switch-language tr_TR --allow-root
Timezone set to Europe/Istanbul via: docker exec wordpress wp option update timezone_string 'Europe/Istanbul' --allow-root
Date format set to d/m/Y, time format H:i
Permalink structure set to /%postname%/ via: docker exec wordpress wp rewrite structure '/%postname%/' --allow-root
Rewrite rules flushed via: docker exec wordpress wp rewrite flush --allow-root
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp option get WPLANG --allow-root returns tr_TR
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp option get permalink_structure --allow-root returns /%postname%/
userStories.notes: SSH: ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158. All WP-CLI commands need --allow-root flag. WP-CLI installed manually in container (curl phar).

userStories.title: WooCommerce Store Settings
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want WooCommerce configured with correct store address, currency, product settings, and guest checkout enabled so that the store operates correctly for Turkish customers.
acceptanceCriteria: Store address set to Iskenderun, Hatay, TR:31, 31200
Sales restricted to Turkey only (woocommerce_allowed_countries = specific, woocommerce_specific_allowed_countries = [TR])
Shipping restricted to Turkey only (woocommerce_ship_to_countries = specific, woocommerce_specific_ship_to_countries = [TR])
Currency: TRY, position right_space, dot thousands sep, comma decimal sep, 2 decimal places
Weight unit: kg, Dimension unit: cm
Reviews enabled, verified owners only required
Guest checkout enabled
Account creation enabled at checkout and My Account page
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp option get woocommerce_currency --allow-root returns TRY
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp option get woocommerce_default_country --allow-root returns TR:31
userStories.notes: Most settings were already configured. Added checkout login reminder. Verified currency=TRY, country=TR:31, guest checkout=yes.

userStories.title: KDV Tax Configuration
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want 20% KDV (VAT) configured with prices displayed tax-inclusive so that customers see final prices.
acceptanceCriteria: Tax calculation enabled: woocommerce_calc_taxes = yes
Prices entered including tax: woocommerce_prices_include_tax = yes
Tax based on store base address: woocommerce_tax_based_on = base
Tax display in shop and cart: inclusive
Price display suffix: KDV dahil
Standard tax rate inserted: country TR, rate 20.0000, name KDV, applied to shipping
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp db query 'SELECT * FROM wp_woocommerce_tax_rates' --allow-root shows TR 20% KDV row
userStories.notes: DB table prefix is inct_ (not wp_). Tax rate inserted via mariadb container. DB name: inanctekstil_db.

userStories.title: Shipping Zones — Hatay Only
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want shipping configured for Hatay province only with flat rate, free shipping threshold, and local pickup so that orders outside Hatay are blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Hatay shipping zone created covering postcodes 31000-31999
Flat rate method added: name 'Kargo ile Teslimat', cost 75 TL
Free shipping method added: name 'Ucretsiz Kargo', minimum order 1000 TL
Local pickup method added: name 'Elden Teslim (Iskenderun)', cost 0 TL
No shipping methods exist for 'Locations not covered by your other zones' (blocks non-Hatay orders)
Verify via browser: enter non-Hatay address at checkout, shipping shows no available methods
Reference: docs/ecommerce/shipping-delivery.md
userStories.notes: All shipping settings were already configured. Hatay zone (ID 1) with flat rate 75 TL, free shipping 1000 TL min, local pickup 0 TL. Zone 0 has no methods.

userStories.title: Product Categories
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want product categories created for the 4 curtain types so that products are organized and filterable.
acceptanceCriteria: Category 'Tul Perdeler' created with slug tul-perdeler
Category 'Fon Perdeler' created with slug fon-perdeler
Category 'Blackout Perdeler' created with slug blackout-perdeler
Category 'Saten' created with slug saten
Any existing test products (IDs 12, 13, 14 if they exist) deleted with --force flag
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp wc product_cat list --user=1 --allow-root shows all 4 categories
userStories.notes: Categories created: Tul Perdeler (16), Fon Perdeler (17), Blackout Perdeler (18), Saten (19). Test products 12-14 did not exist.

userStories.title: Install Core Plugins
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want all required plugins installed and activated so that the store has search, wishlist, slider, chat, image optimization, email, analytics, security, and compliance functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: ajax-search-for-woocommerce (FiboSearch) installed and active
yith-woocommerce-wishlist installed and active
smart-slider-3 installed and active
joinchat (Join.chat WhatsApp) installed and active
shortpixel-image-optimiser installed and active
wp-mail-smtp installed and active
complianz-gdpr installed and active
google-site-kit installed and active
wordfence installed and active
starter-templates installed and active
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp plugin list --status=active --allow-root shows all 10 plugins active
userStories.notes: Correct slugs: joinchat = creame-whatsapp-me, starter-templates = astra-sites. Some plugins were already installed (wp-mail-smtp, complianz-gdpr, google-site-kit, wordfence).

userStories.title: Astra Theme Colors and Typography

Body font set to Inter weight 400/600 via Astra Customizer > Global > Typography
Base font size: 16px
Button style: background #1B2A4A, text white, border-radius 4px
Link color: #1B2A4A with hover state slightly lighter
Verify in browser: homepage displays Playfair Display headings, Inter body text, navy accents
Verify in browser at 375px: typography is readable on mobile
Reference: docs/brand/gorsel-kimlik.md

userStories.title: Astra Header Builder
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a professional header with announcement bar, logo, search bar, account/wishlist/cart icons, and navigation menu so that I can easily browse and shop.
acceptanceCriteria: Above Header row: promo text 'Olcunuze Ozel Dikim Perde — Hatay Icine 1000 TL Uzeri Ucretsiz Kargo' with background #F8F8F8, text centered
Primary Header: Logo left (upload SVG from docs/brand/assets/logo/inanc-tekstil-logo.svg, max 200px wide)
Primary Header: FiboSearch search bar in center position
Primary Header: Account icon + YITH Wishlist icon + WooCommerce cart icon with badge in right position
Below Header: Navigation menu 'Ana Menu' with items: Ana Sayfa, Tul Perdeler, Fon Perdeler, Blackout, Saten, Hakkimizda, Iletisim
Sticky header enabled
Mobile: hamburger menu triggers off-canvas drawer with full navigation
Mobile: search bar accessible from header
Verify in browser at 1440px: header shows all elements correctly
Verify in browser at 375px: hamburger menu, search, cart icon visible
userStories.notes: Header builder configured: Above=announcement, Primary=logo+search+account+cart, Below=menu-1 on navy. Logo SVG uploaded (ID 77). Sticky enabled. Mobile has hamburger+search+cart. YITH Wishlist accessible via plugin page (not a native Astra header element).

userStories.title: Astra Footer Builder
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a professional 4-column footer with navigation, customer service links, legal links, contact info, and payment icons.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer widget area with 4 columns configured via Astra footer builder
Col 1: Site title or logo + short text 'Iskenderun'da 30 yildir olcuye ozel perde dikimi' + Instagram link placeholder
Col 2: 'Hizli Linkler' heading with links: Ana Sayfa, Urunler (shop), Hakkimizda, Iletisim

Col 4: 'Iletisim' heading with: Iskenderun Hatay (address placeholder), Telefon (placeholder), WhatsApp (placeholder), Calisma Saatleri (placeholder)
Footer bottom bar: '(c) 2026 Inanc Tekstil' left side, payment icons text 'Visa | Mastercard | Troy' right side
'Powered by Astra' text removed or replaced
Verify in browser: footer renders 4 columns on desktop, single column on mobile (375px)
userStories.notes: Footer configured with 4 HTML columns (html-3 to html-6) + bottom bar (copyright + html-7). Navy background. Contact info has placeholders for phone/WhatsApp/hours.

userStories.title: Essential Pages and Navigation Menu

acceptanceCriteria: 'Ana Sayfa' page created and set as static front page (show_on_front = page)

acceptanceCriteria: Image gallery with zoom/lightbox enabled via Astra WooCommerce settings
Curtain calculator section (already deployed via inanc-curtain-calculator plugin v2.0.0) is visually prominent — not hidden or collapsed

WooCommerce product tabs present with customized content: Tab 1 'Urun Detaylari' (default Description tab), Tab 2 'Bakim Bilgileri' (Additional Information or custom tab with care instructions placeholder), Tab 3 'Kargo ve Iade' (custom tab with content: 5-7 is gunu teslimat, sadece Hatay, iade kosullari from docs/ecommerce/shipping-delivery.md)

Order review summary visible on checkout

userStories.title: WP Mail SMTP Configuration
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want email delivery configured so that order confirmation and notification emails are reliably sent.
acceptanceCriteria: WP Mail SMTP plugin configured with From email: info@inanctekstil.store, From name: Inanc Tekstil
SMTP mailer configured (Resend or Google Workspace — check docs/infrastructure/email-setup.md for available credentials)
If no SMTP credentials available: configure with 'Other SMTP' and leave host/credentials as placeholder, document in notes
Test email sent from WP Mail SMTP > Tools > Email Test (if credentials available)
Verify: plugin settings saved without errors
userStories.notes: Reference: docs/infrastructure/email-setup.md. If SMTP credentials are not yet available, configure the plugin structure and leave credentials blank — mark in notes for manual completion. Do NOT commit any credentials to git.

userStories.title: Wordfence Security Configuration
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want basic security hardening so that the site is protected from brute-force attacks and common threats.
acceptanceCriteria: Wordfence plugin activated and initial setup completed
Brute force protection enabled
Lockout after 5 failed login attempts
Rate limiting enabled
Initial security scan run and results reviewed
Verify: docker exec wordpress wp plugin get wordfence --field=status --allow-root returns 'active'
userStories.notes: Configure via wp-admin > Wordfence > All Options. Requires accepting Wordfence license terms. Free tier is sufficient.

userStories.title: Google Analytics and Search Console
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want Google Analytics and Search Console connected so that I can track visitors and search performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Site Kit by Google plugin activated
Google Analytics 4 property connected (or setup wizard started if Google auth not possible from CLI)
Google Search Console connected (or setup wizard started)
Enhanced e-commerce tracking enabled in GA4 settings
If Google auth not possible: document that manual wp-admin authentication is required, leave plugin activated and ready
Verify: Site Kit dashboard accessible at wp-admin > Site Kit
userStories.notes: Site Kit requires Google account OAuth authentication via the wp-admin browser wizard. This cannot be fully automated via CLI. Activate plugin and prepare — manual auth step may be needed.

userStories.title: Backup Automation
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want automated daily backups of the database and wp-content so that I can recover from any failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Backup directory created: /opt/backups/ on the server
Backup script created at /opt/backups/daily-backup.sh with: MariaDB dump, wp-content tar.gz, acme.json copy
Script deletes backups older than 14 days
Script is executable (chmod +x)
Cron job added: daily at 02:00 running the backup script
Manual test run succeeds: /opt/backups/daily-backup.sh creates backup files
Verify: ls /opt/backups/ shows db-YYYY-MM-DD.sql, wp-content-YYYY-MM-DD.tar.gz, acme-YYYY-MM-DD.json
Reference: docs/infrastructure/backup-recovery.md
userStories.notes: Already configured. Script at /opt/backups/daily-backup.sh, cron at 02:00 daily. Backup files verified for 2026-03-14.

userStories.title: PayTR Payment Gateway (BLOCKED)
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to pay with credit/debit card via PayTR so that I can complete purchases online.
acceptanceCriteria: BLOCKED: Requires PayTR merchant approval with Merchant ID, Key, and Salt from paytr.com (3-5 business days)
PayTR WooCommerce plugin ZIP uploaded to server and installed via WP-CLI
PayTR credentials set in wp-config.php: PAYTR_MERCHANT_ID, PAYTR_MERCHANT_KEY, PAYTR_MERCHANT_SALT
PayTR enabled in WooCommerce > Payments with title 'Kredi Karti / Banka Karti ile Ode'
Payment type: iFrame, Language: Turkish, Installments: enabled
Test mode enabled initially
Sandbox test payment succeeds with card 4355 0843 5508 4358, expiry 12/30, CVV 000, 3D password: a
Order status updates to 'Isleniyor' on successful payment
Failed payment shows error message
After all tests pass: switch to live mode
'Taksit Secenekleri' tab added to product pages
Reference: docs/ecommerce/paytr-integration.md
userStories.notes: BLOCKED on external dependency: PayTR merchant approval. Plugin ZIP must be downloaded from PayTR panel. Do NOT commit merchant credentials to git. Skip this story until credentials are available.

userStories.title: End-to-End Verification
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want a complete end-to-end test of the entire site to verify everything works together before launch.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage: hero carousel, category cards, trust badges, featured products, about teaser, footer all render
Navigation: all menu items work (Ana Sayfa, 4 categories, Hakkimizda, Iletisim)
Shop page: product grid, category filter, price filter, sort, breadcrumbs functional
Product page: image gallery, calculator, tabs (details, care, shipping), wishlist, add-to-cart functional
Cart: items display with curtain meta, quantities adjustable, totals correct with KDV
Checkout: billing fields, Hatay shipping options, delivery notice, terms checkbox present
Legal pages: all 5 pages render with Turkish content from templates
Cookie banner: appears in incognito browser with Turkish text
Mobile (375px): all pages render correctly, hamburger menu works, WhatsApp button visible
Footer: 4 columns render, all links work, payment text visible
Search: FiboSearch active and returns results page (empty results acceptable if no products)
Blocked shipping: non-Hatay address shows no shipping methods available
Note: order completion test requires PayTR (US-025) — skip payment test if blocked
userStories.notes: This is a verification story — no new code. Walk through every page and feature checking against the criteria. Use browser at 1440px and 375px viewports. Document any issues found.

userStories.title: Pre-Launch Checklist
userStories.description: As a store owner, I want all final checks completed before going live.
acceptanceCriteria: All test products deleted — only real products remain (or no products if photos not ready yet)
WP_DEBUG set to false or WP_DEBUG_LOG only (not displaying errors on frontend)
Admin password verified as strong (not default)
Wordfence security scan returns clean results
SSL certificate valid and auto-renewing (Let's Encrypt via Traefik)
Backup cron job running: verify via 'crontab -l' on server shows daily 02:00 job
All 5 legal pages populated with content (placeholder business details are acceptable — documented for manual update)
Google Analytics tracking confirmed active (or ready for manual auth)
Email delivery tested (or documented as needing SMTP credentials)
Contact info placeholders documented in a checklist for store owner to update manually
'Coming soon' or maintenance mode disabled if currently active
userStories.notes: Final verification story. Check each item, document status. Create a handoff note listing any remaining manual steps (PayTR credentials, SMTP credentials, real phone/address, product photos).
